mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pay_date, '%Y-%m') AS sale_month, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue, COUNT(pay_no) AS order_count FROM payment WHERE pay_status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY sale_month ORDER BY sale_month;
SELECT REVIEW_NO, USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, APPROVAL_STATUS, REG_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER() AS REVIEW_WAIT, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS POST_DAY FROM REVIEW WHERE APPROVAL_STATUS = "WAIT";

SELECT REPORT_NO, REPORTER_ID, TARGET_TYPE, CASE WHEN TARGET_TYPE = 'MEMBER' THEN TARGET_USER_ID ELSE CAST(TARGET_ID AS CHAR) END AS UNI_TARGET_ID, REPORT_TITLE, REPORT_CONTENT, ANSWER_STATUS, ACTION_STATUS, REG_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER() AS REPORT_WAIT, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REPORT_DAY FROM REPORT WHERE 1=1
AND target_type = #{targetType}
AND action_status = 0
AND action_status = 1 AND answer_status = 0
AND action_status = 1 AND answer_status = 1
ORDER BY reg_date DESC
SELECT PASS_NO, PASS_NAME, PRICE, REVIEW_CNT, IS_ACTIVE, REG_DATE FROM PASS_PRODUCT WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1
SELECT * FROM PAYMENT P INNER JOIN PAYMENT_PASS P2 ON P.PAY_NO = P2.PAY_NO WHERE PASS_NO = 1 AND PAY_STATUS = "SUCCESS" AND USER_ID = #{userId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment ( user_id, amount, pay_status, pay_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{amount}, 'SUCCESS', NOW() )
